testcase.name: test_copyright
testcase.failure: test/test_copyright.py:23: in test_copyright assert rc == 0, 'Found errors' E AssertionError: Found errors E assert 1 == 0

testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 28 code style errors / warnings: ./setup.py:31:1: W391 blank line at end of file ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:5:1: F401 'time' imported but unused ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:15:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:15:35: W291 trailing whitespace ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:77:35: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:77:37: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:77:68: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals ./dobot_demos/PTP_client.py:77:70: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals ./dobot_demos/pick_and_place.py:16:100: E501 line too long (117 > 99 characters) line too long (113 > 99 characters) ./dobot_demos/pick_and_place.py:54:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_demos/pick_and_place.py:67:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_demos/pick_and_place.py:74:100: E501 line too long (120 > 99 characters) ./dobot_demos/pick_and_place.py:116:1: W391 blank line at end of file ./dobot_demos/homing_client.py:16:5: E303 too blank line at end of file assert 1 == 0
